step.name: enumerate-endpoints
step.action: For each endpoint: copy path + method.

step.name: build-security-matrix
step.action: For each endpoint, list test_cases: anonymous-401 (non-public), wrong-perm-403, happy-200/201, validation-400, not-found-404, cross-user-403 if user-owned resource.
step.decision-gate: Reject any non-public endpoint missing anonymous-401.

step.name: enumerate-service-tests
step.action: For each service: declare a Test<Service> class with scenarios: happy_path + error cases + side-effect cases. Mock external boundaries (Celery, payment provider, email).

step.name: mark-transactional-db
step.action: Set uses_transactional_db=true for tests asserting on transaction.on_commit, post-commit signals, rollback behaviour, select_for_update.

step.name: declare-ci
step.action: Set ci.db_engine="postgresql" (match production), parallel=true, coverage_command="pytest -n auto --cov=apps --cov-report=xml --cov-fail-under=80".
